AppTagline: A self-hosted film quote REST API.
RestApiDescription: The Quotinator API serves real, verified film quotes over a clean REST interface.
ChangelogMachineTranslatedDisclaimer: This summary was machine-translated and may contain errors.
AboutDescription: Quotinator is built with ASP.NET Core (.NET 10) and deployed as a Docker container targeting linux/amd64 and linux/arm64.
AboutRoadmapV2: SQLite backend, write endpoints, management UI
TranslationsQuoteContent: Quote content is stored in its original language. Where a manual translation exists, append ?lang= to any endpoint to request it — for example ?lang=nl for Dutch.
TranslationsUi: The UI and API error messages follow your browser's language preference automatically.
ErrorSearchQueryRequired: The q parameter is required. Provide a search term.
ErrorSearchQueryTooLong: The search term must not exceed 200 characters.
ErrorLangInvalid: lang must be a valid ISO 639-1 language code (e.g. en, nl, de).
ErrorTypeInvalid: type must be one of: movie, tv, anime, book, person.
ErrorTooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please slow down.
ErrorLimitOutOfRange: limit must be a whole number between 1 and 100.
ErrorRandomNOutOfRange: n must be a whole number between 1 and 100.
ErrorPageOutOfRange: page must be a whole number of 1 or greater.
ErrorPageSizeOutOfRange: pageSize must be a whole number between 0 and 500.
ErrorPageBeyondLastPage: The requested page does not exist — fewer pages are available at this pageSize.
ErrorQuoteNotFound: No quote with the requested ID was found.
ErrorFieldInvalid: field must be one of: quote, source, character, author.
ErrorGenreInvalid: One or more genre values are not recognised. Valid genres: action, adventure, animation, comedy, drama, fantasy, fiction, horror, mystery, non-fiction, romance, sci-fi, thriller.
InfoNoQuotesMatchFilters: No quotes match the given filters.
ErrorFilterInputTooLong: Filter values must not exceed 200 characters.
ErrorFilterInputInvalid: One or more filter values contain invalid characters.
ErrorDecadeInvalid: decade must be divisible by 10 (e.g. 80 or 1980 for the 1980s, 00 or 2000 for the 2000s).
ErrorYearRangeInvalid: yearFrom must not be greater than yearTo.
ErrorNumericParameterInvalid: One or more query parameters contain an invalid value. Numeric parameters (yearFrom, yearTo, year, decade, page, pageSize, n) must be whole numbers.
ErrorSeedFileMissing: This source file no longer exists on disk.
ErrorSeedFileInvalidJson: This source file is empty or its content is not valid JSON.
ErrorImportSettingsInvalid: The settings field is not valid, or contains an unrecognised duplicate-resolution policy.
ErrorImportActionNotFound: No import action exists with that id.
ErrorImportActionAlreadyResolved: This import action has already been applied or discarded and can no longer be decided.
ErrorImportActionNotDecided: This import action has no staged decision to undo.
ErrorImportActionNotDecidable: This import action is a '{0}' action and cannot be manually decided — this action's entity type does not currently support a Modify decision.
ErrorImportActionAmbiguousFieldsUnresolv: The following fields are ambiguous and need an explicit decision: {0}.
ErrorImportActionBatchNotFullyDecided: Not every action in this batch has a decision yet. Decide the remaining actions before applying.
ErrorImportActionBatchInvalidState: This batch cannot be discarded — it has already been applied, already been discarded, or has no staged actions.
ErrorImportBatchNotFound: No import batch exists with that id.
ErrorImportFileOrBatchIdRequired: You must provide either a file to import or a batchId to apply an already-staged batch.
ErrorImportActionBatchNotReversible: This batch cannot be reversed — it is not currently applied, is not the most recently applied batch still live, has no actions, or a Modify's original Source/Character/Person linkage can no longer be resolved.
ErrorConversationNotFound: No conversation with the requested ID was found.
ErrorSourceNotFound: No source with the requested ID was found.
ErrorCharacterNotFound: No character with the requested ID was found.
ErrorPersonNotFound: No person with the requested ID was found.
ErrorSeriesNotFound: No series with the requested ID was found.
ErrorUniverseNotFound: No universe with the requested ID was found.
ErrorStageDirectionNotFound: No stage direction with the requested ID was found.
ErrorSoundCueNotFound: No sound cue with the requested ID was found.
AdminEndpointsDescription: These endpoints require an X-Api-Key header matching the admin_api_key configured in the add-on options. They are unavailable when no key is configured.
ImportEndpointsDescription: These endpoints live under /api/v1/import. Importing quotes and deciding or applying staged actions require the same X-Api-Key header as the admin endpoints above; listing actions does not.
